value.found_quote: Codex reviews the pull request diff, follows your repository guidance, and posts a standard GitHub code review focused on serious issues.
value.rationale: The page directly describes Codex code review in GitHub: it reviews the PR diff, follows repository-specific guidance (AGENTS.md review guidelines), and posts a standard GitHub code review focused on serious issues (P0/P1). This matches all aspects of the claim. The page presents it as an available feature with no indication of deprecation or sunset.
